sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 124 of 2020 ITRA 125 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.26. 2. For orders on CMA No.130/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 26.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Taseer Khan, advocate for the applicant. These reference applications are pending since 2020 without any progress Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Diary denotes on previous occasion counsel for the application was absent and even today counsel appearing expresses inability to assist. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
